display_information.name: SqueezeOS
display_information.description: Institutional AI market intelligence. Squeeze scanner, options flow, council verdicts — delivered to Slack. Pay-per-call via RLUSD.
display_information.long_description:
SqueezeOS is an institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform that delivers real-time market signals directly to your Slack workspace.

What SqueezeOS gives you:
• Squeeze Scanner — scans $1–$50 universe for institutional setup conditions
• Council Verdict — multi-engine AI consensus (OracleEngine + Battle Computer + MMLE) on any symbol
• Triple Lock — rarest max-conviction signal when all 3 proprietary engines align
• Options Intelligence — sweeps, whale activity, dark pool prints
• IWM 0DTE Scorer — zero-day-to-expiry contract rankings in real time
• 741 Macro Stack — proprietary macro regime indicator across 5 EMA layers
• Avg-Down Engine — automated pyramid builder on 5-layer EMA ribbon
• FTD Oracle — SEC Reg SHO Fails-To-Deliver data + ETF basket decomposition
• Signal Futures — prediction market where agents stake on next council verdict
• Stigmergy Protocol — swarm coordination pheromone signals

Free slash commands included. Premium signals require x402 micropayment (RLUSD on XRP Ledger — fractions of a cent per call). No subscriptions. No API keys. AI agents can pay for their own data.

slash_commands.description: Get AI council verdict for any ticker
Run full squeeze scanner across $1–$50 universe
Free bias + regime preview for any symbol
FTD data for GME or AMC (Fails-To-Deliver)
